task_completion.description: Navigate to the Recruitment or Applications section of the system.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Recruitment dashboard, job positions list, or applications pipeline is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Locate the active applications for 'James Miller' under the 'Trainee' position.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The search bar contains filters for 'James Miller' and/or 'Trainee', and the corresponding application records are displayed in a list or kanban view.

task_completion.description: Select the 3 applications belonging to James Miller.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Checkboxes next to the 3 applications for James Miller are ticked in a list view, or the agent is viewing the applications individually to process them.

task_completion.description: Trigger the Archive action for the selected applications.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Action' dropdown menu is open with 'Archive' highlighted/clicked, or an 'Archive' confirmation dialog/button is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Verify that the applications have been successfully archived and are no longer in the active pipeline.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The applications display an 'Archived' ribbon/badge, or the active pipeline no longer shows James Miller's applications, or they are visible only when an 'Archived' filter is explicitly applied.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual web application UI to perform the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser with the application interface, not a terminal, python script, or text editor.

integrity.description: The agent archived the applications rather than deleting or refusing them.
integrity.visual_evidence: There is no evidence of clicking 'Delete' or 'Refuse' buttons, and no rejection email drafts or deletion confirmation modals are shown.

integrity.description: The agent genuinely navigated and clicked through the interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Mouse cursors, dropdown menus, and sequential page transitions are visible, indicating real GUI interaction rather than URL manipulation or API calls.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Candidate Name: 'James Miller'. Job Position: 'Trainee'. Expected Count: Exactly 3 applications exist for this candidate and must be archived.
